title: AST MVC- FATAL: Fairbanks [AK25052358]
summary: A black Dodge was traveling south on the Parks Hwy. It was observed by multiple people speeding around 100mph in a 60mph zone to include a work zone. The vehicle came close to hitting two construction signal workers causing them to jump out of the way of the vehicle as it sped through the work zone....
sourceAttribution: Source: Alaska State Troopers Daily Dispatch

title: AST Wildlife Violation: Kenai River [AK25052211]
summary: On 05/31/2025, Alaska Wildlife Troopers contacted Dennis Shangin, age 68 of Soldotna, while operating a smelt drift gillnet in the Kenai River. Shangin's net measured 5' in depth in violation of the law. Shangin was issued a citation with a mandatory court date and up to $500 fine.

title: SIWO Forecast – May 30, 2025
summary: Assessment of Current Ice Conditions Relevant to Distribution and Access of Walrus Click the name of each community below to view more frequently updated and detailed information from the National Weather Service. Synopsis : There will be a few waves of low pressure making their way through the Bering Sea that will cause southerly flow, potentially gusty winds, and rain/snow showers for much of the day on Friday and Saturday. Another low pressure will set up in the Bering Sea on Sunday morning and will cause the winds to shift southeasterly, easterly by early Monday morning, and finally northerly by late Monday evening and should persist throughout the rest of the week. Winds will stay gusting into the 25–30 mph (22–26 kts) range through Monday. Winds could begin gusting again through the Bering Strait by Tuesday afternoon through the day on Thursday. Scattered showers may accompany these low pressures and impact much of the area for the week but should dwindle off by the end of the we...

title: AST Warrant Arrest: Fairbanks [AK25044540]
summary: On 05/30/2025 at 2352 hours a Trooper conducted a traffic stop on Luketravis Zwaschka-Taylor's vehicle. The Trooper knew he had an active warrant for his arrest. Luketravis was the driver. He was arrested and remanded at FCC without incident.
